# Clinical Research Methods in R {#sec-clinical-methods}

```{r setup}
#| include: false
#| eval: true
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
source(here::here("R/load-packages.R"))
```

## Introduction

This session introduces clinical research modeling concepts such as
comparative analysis, cohort studies, and hypothesis testing for research.

## Learning outcomes

- Understand study design and research questions.
- Translate clinical data questions into analysis plans.
- Implement analytic workflows with tidyverse tools.
